documentation.file_docstring: Tunnel configuration for exposing the webhook server.
inline_comments: Start an ngrok tunnel to expose the local webhook server. Uses the ngrok CLI which must be installed: https://ngrok.com/download @example const tunnel = await startNgrokTunnel({ port: 3334, path: '/voice/webhook' }); console.log('Public URL:', tunnel.publicUrl); // Later: await tunnel.stop();
Add custom domain if provided (paid ngrok feature)
ngrok logs the public URL in a 'started tunnel' message
Also check for the URL field directly
Add path to the public URL
Not JSON, might be startup message
Run an ngrok command and wait for completion.
Check if ngrok is installed and available.
Start a tunnel based on configuration.
